prompt:
Goal: Create a clean workflow presentation canvas showing how a futuristic anime character design is developed into a character sheet and then into a 3D sci-fi vehicle concept.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 light gray canvas with a subtle evenly spaced dotted grid background. Use lots of negative space and a modern design-board aesthetic.

Layout: Arrange exactly 4 main visual elements connected as a process. In the top-left, place a small black rounded-rectangle preview board containing exactly 3 vertical concept images: 1 small full-body pink-and-black character sketch on the left, 1 larger full-body white-haired character concept in the middle, and 1 dynamic close-up motorcycle/rider illustration on the right. In the lower-left, place a large rounded white card with a full-body character render. In the center, place a horizontal character turnaround/spec sheet. On the right, place a large rounded rectangular cinematic render of a futuristic motorcycle. Add faint thin gray connector lines/arrows flowing from the left character card to the central sheet and from the central sheet to the right vehicle render.

Subject details: The main character is Rabbit Racer, a stylized cyberpunk anime girl with spiky white hair, pink bunny-ear helmet or head fins, a cropped white-and-pink jacket with oversized sleeves, black leggings, pink armor accents, and chunky futuristic roller-skate boots. The design language is glossy pink, white, black, and dark gray, with sharp mecha details and racing motifs. The center spec sheet should show exactly 3 main full-body turnaround poses across the middle, plus smaller detail callouts for clothing, boots, accessories, color swatches, and vehicle miniatures. The right render shows a compact pink-and-white futuristic racing motorcycle with circular wheel housings, angular armor panels, black mechanical parts, decals, and a glossy cinematic studio-lit look.

Text content: Include the readable title RABBIT RACER on the central character sheet, with tiny technical labels and color chips that look like a professional model sheet; the small text can be mostly decorative and not fully readable.

Visual style: Polished AI concept-art workflow mockup, crisp digital illustration mixed with product-design presentation, soft shadows, rounded corners, high-resolution details, muted gray interface background, elegant spacing, no clutter.

Constraints: Keep the 4 main elements exactly as described, preserve the left-to-right workflow, avoid extra panels, avoid watermarks, avoid logos, and do not add large explanatory captions outside the character sheet.

promptZh:
目标：创建一个简洁的工作流演示画布，展示未来感动漫角色设计如何从角色设定图演变为 3D 科幻载具概念。

画布：宽屏 16:9 浅灰色画布，带有精致且间距均匀的网格背景。利用大量留白，呈现现代设计项目的美感。

布局：排列 4 个核心视觉元素，形成清晰的流程。左上角放置一个黑色圆角矩形预览项目，内含 3 张垂直概念图：左侧为 1 张小型粉黑配色全身角色草图，中间为 1 张较大的白发角色概念图，右侧为 1 张动态的摩托车/骑手特写插画。左下角放置一张大型圆角白色卡片，展示全身角色渲染图。中心放置一张横向的角色三视图/规格表。右侧放置一张大型圆角矩形，展示未来感摩托车的电影级渲染图。添加细微的灰色连接线/箭头，从左侧角色卡片流向中心规格表，再从规格表流向右侧载具渲染图。

主体细节：主角为 Rabbit Racer，一位风格化的赛博朋克动漫少女，拥有尖刺状白发、粉色兔耳头盔或头鳍、短款白粉配色夹克配超大袖子、黑色紧身裤、粉色护甲装饰以及厚实的未来感轮滑靴。设计语言采用亮面粉色、白色、黑色和深灰色，融合锐利的机甲细节与赛车元素。中心规格表应在中间展示 3 个主要的全身三视图姿势，并辅以服装、靴子、配饰、色卡和载具缩略图的细节标注。右侧渲染图展示一辆紧凑型粉白配色未来感赛车摩托，配有圆形轮毂、棱角分明的装甲板、黑色机械部件、贴纸，并呈现出亮面电影级摄影棚灯光效果。

文字内容：在中心角色规格表上包含可读标题 RABBIT RACER，并配有类似专业模型图的微型技术标签和色块；小字部分主要起装饰作用，无需完全可读。

视觉风格：精致的 AI 概念艺术工作流样机，清晰的数字插画与产品设计演示相结合，柔和阴影，圆角设计，高分辨率细节，柔和的灰色界面背景，优雅的间距，无杂乱感。

约束条件：严格按照描述保留 4 个核心元素，保持从左到右的工作流顺序，避免添加额外面板，避免水印，避免 Logo，且不要在角色规格表外添加大段解释性文字。
